channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: D: defective vehicle
item.description: The D line currently runs only between Absberggasse and the stock exchange or between Augasse and Nußdorf S. The trains continue from the stock exchange via the 1 and 71 lines to … [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The D line currently runs only between Absberggasse and the stock exchange or between Augasse and Nußdorf S. The trains continue from the stock exchange via the 1 and 71 lines to …
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: 2: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: 10A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion. [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion.
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: 59A: fire-brigade operation
item.description: Operation only between station Meidling S U and Bärenmühlgang. expected duration: Not foreseeable. [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between station Meidling S U and Bärenmühlgang. expected duration: Not foreseeable.
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: 41E: replacement bus 41E hold at Währinger Str 200
12: service obstruction for rescue operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: N46: Thaliastraße U
item.description: Stop change of line N46 towards Otto-Wagner-Areal Stop: Thaliastraße U From: Lerchenfelder Belt under U6 To: Kaiserstraße 106 Duration: 02 June … [26.05.2026 – 26.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of line N46 towards Otto-Wagner-Areal Stop: Thaliastraße U From: Lerchenfelder Belt under U6 To: Kaiserstraße 106 Duration: 02 June …
[26.05.2026 – 26.06.2026]

item.title: 1/2/2A/43/44/59A/62/71/D/WLB: D, 1, 2, 43, 44, 62, 71, 59A, 1A, Badner Bahn: demonstration on 27.05.2026
item.description: Because of an demonstration it comes to traffic measures period: Wednesday, 27. May 2026, between 11:00 o'clock and 19:00 o'clock. Measures: Line D: diversion in both directions … [26.05.2026 – 27.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of an demonstration it comes to traffic measures period: Wednesday, 27. May 2026, between 11:00 o'clock and 19:00 o'clock. Measures: Line D: diversion in both directions …
[26.05.2026 – 27.05.2026]
